body.title: CLOSED: swarm channel mechanism — mirrored inboxes, fan-out, shared seeded
body.result: ChannelRegistry + fan_out + Skeleton wiring; 17 tests; commit b9a783c
body.description:
Implement multi-party channel rooms backed by mirrored per-participant inboxes. Send-to-channel splits the envelope and delivers to each participant's inbox; each participant's inbox forwards via their preferred transport. The `shared` channel is always present; other channels are created on-demand.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/bus/router.py, agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/broker.py, agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/envelope.py, possibly a new channels.py module
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** IN — channel creation, membership, send-to-channel fan-out, per-participant delivery. OUT — ACL/mute (default permissive per design doc); web UI rendering (T-swarm-web-tab-ui); tmux transport face (T-swarm-tmux-face).
**Test plan:** integration tests — create channel, add two participants, send envelope to channel, assert both participant inboxes receive a copy; assert non-member inbox is untouched; assert `shared` channel exists on init.
**Pass condition:** Two mock agents subscribed to a channel both receive a copy of a sent envelope within one bus dispatch cycle, verified by integration test against real Postgres.
